title: Vardhangad Fort
tagline: Vardhangad Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Vardhangad Fort (Khatav T; 17° 40' N, 74° 15' E; RS.
overview.description: Vardhangad Fort (Khatav T; 17° 40' N, 74° 15' E; RS. Koregaon, 9 m. W; p. 1,686) lies on the Bhadle-Kundla spur of the Mahadev range at a point of it on the boundary between the Koregaon and Khatav Talukas, seven miles north-east of Koregaon and nine miles north-east of Satara.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Koregaon
topPlaces.description: Koregaon is a census town and headquarters for the surrounding Koregaon Taluka in the Satara subdivision of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is situated on the NH-548C Satara-Baitul National Highway about 18 km east of Satara city, about 120 km from Pune and 267 km from Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Kanherkhed
topPlaces.description: Kanherkhed is a village in Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It was the home village of Scindia family that later ruled the Gwalior State.

topPlaces.name: Jihe
topPlaces.description: Jihe is a village in Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It is situated on the banks of Krishna River, approximately 15 km away from Satara, a city in Satara district.

items.note: Koregaon is a census town and headquarters for the surrounding Koregaon Taluka in the Satara subdivision of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is situated on the NH-548C Satara-Baitul National Highway about 18 km east of Satara city, about 120 km from Pune and 267 km from Mumbai.
Kanherkhed is a village in Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It was the home village of Scindia family that later ruled the Gwalior State.
Jihe is a village in Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It is situated on the banks of Krishna River, approximately 15 km away from Satara, a city in Satara district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vardhangad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vardhangad Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vardhangad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (104 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (100 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vardhangad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vardhangad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vardhangad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Vardhangad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vardhangad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Koregaon, Kanherkhed, Jihe.
